translations.01KQXQV10G8XGBY6Q5Y25TYFGP: 以下命令包含 Warp 软件包仓库和 PGP 签名密钥的一次性配置。
translations.01KQXQV120DY0VJ7SZGC1WC57R: 函数将确保 Warp 软件包仓库已启用，因为我们检测到您最近升级了发行版。
translations.01KQXQV123WJ2NT8G13Y9597QP: 或兼容工具安装 Warp，预填的命令将为您更新 Warp。
translations.01KQXQV1278K34A3HC9ZDY3DSS: 以安装更新并重新启动 Warp。
translations.01KQXQV12CPCE2PXF9K8TH2P7M: 如果您当初安装 Warp 时使用了

notes: Batch C — Linux Wayland computer_use + autoupdate/linux + font_fallback + warp_util/path. Decisions: (1) wayland/screenshot.rs (15) and wayland/session.rs (11): all strings are Result<_,String> errors that bubble through Actor::perform_actions to ai/blocklist/action_model/execute/use_computer.rs, where they become UseComputerResult::Error(error). The driver writes 'Use computer error: {error}' back into the LLM transcript (see app/src/ai/agent_sdk/driver/output.rs:288). Sink is LLM tool-call output / log file, never a UI surface (toast/dialog/text element). Per §11, flag as telemetry_payload. The two permission-denied messages (DFSDSW8/DFWN8) are explicitly authored 'for the agent' per the doc comments at session.rs:124,139. (2) autoupdate/linux.rs: lines 17,19,21 are doc-comments inside lazy_static!{} → extractor_false_positive_doc_comment. Lines 209,213,216,224,239,245,247,249 are FormattedTextLine/Fragment content rendered in AutoupdateContextBlock — translated as user-facing UI text, preserving leading whitespace/newlines and placeholder {package_manager_name}. Line 209 is an h3 heading (no trailing punctuation). Lines 503 and 583 are anyhow .context(...) calls whose error chains are discarded (line 330 'if let Ok(...) = PackageManager::detect()' silently drops Err) or fed only to log::warn (line 559) — telemetry_payload. (3) font_fallback.rs (12): all entries are ExternalFontFamily.name values registered into the font system; these are font-family identifiers used to look up fonts via OS/text-shaping APIs, not UI labels. Tagged protocol_key. (4) warp_util/path.rs (14): lines 20,24,29,30,32,33,35,37,39,40,42,46 are /// doc comments inside lazy_static!{} → extractor_false_positive_doc_comment. Line 27 'Shell escape regex should be valid' is .expect(...) (also used at line 44) → panic_message. Line 166 'First group always exists' is .expect(...) (also used at line 171) → panic_message. Counts: 12 translated (autoupdate UI), 53 flagged null (27 telemetry_payload, 12 protocol_key, 14 extractor_false_positive_doc_comment, 2 panic_message... wait correct total: 26 telemetry [15+11+0 from autoupdate] hmm). Final tally: 26 telemetry (15 screenshot + 11 session + 0 autoupdate-direct? let me recount). Actual: 15 (screenshot) + 11 (session) + 2 (autoupdate context errors) = 28 telemetry; 12 protocol_key; 3 (autoupdate doc) + 12 (path doc) = 15 extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; 2 panic_message; 8 translated (autoupdate UI). 28+12+15+2+8 = 65.
